rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY** GUARDIANSHIP OF HAYDEN ANGELO DE BARROS CHEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TRANSFER to CONTRA COSTA County
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/01/2021. 1) Petition must be signed and verified by petitioner. [See CRC 7.103]. 2) Petitioner must give and file notice of the petition. [Probate Code 2214]. 3) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/15/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAMES YATES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The petition requests payment of fees and costs of the conservator and her attorney in the total amount of $114,129.87, less $10,440 already paid to the conservator as fees on account, consisting of: (a) $29,309 in fees for services of the conservator of person, less fees on account already paid during one-year account period; (b) $40,880.50 in fees for services of the conservator of estate; (c) $397.12 in costs to the conservator for mileage, bridge tolls, and parking; (d) $42,990 in fees for services of the conservator's attorney; and (e) $553.25 in costs to the conservator's attorney. 2) The conservator requests authority to pay, as fees on account, $175 per hour for her services as conservator of the person up to 8 hours per month, and $155 per hour for her services as conservator of the estate up to 8 hours per month, on and after January 1, 2022. 3) The conservatee's spouse did not sign and verify the objections filed by his attorney on 08/02/2021. No proof of service showing notice of the objections given to the conservator's surety is on file. The attorney for the conservatee's spouse was informed of those issues via e-mail on 08/18/2021, but nothing has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELIZABETH F. COOPER TRUST F/B/O ANN R. MILLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #23, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/30/2021. 1) Please provide legal basis/cite legal authority for calculating the 1% fee on what appears to be an amount other than the fair market value of the assets at the end of the account period. Please explain how this calculation conform to LRSF 14.53. 2) Trustee timesheets show $2,700.00 in requested fees from 01/06/2021 to 01/27/2021. Please explain and file legal basis/cite legal authority in support of requesting fees for this time period when fees for this time period were already awarded in the prior account. 3) Please provide legal basis/cite legal authority for attorney requesting estimated additional services of $3,720.00. 4) Please file receipts for all the distributions. 5) Please explain and provide evidence of the original will of Ann Miller being lodged. [Probate Code 8200]. 6) Please address the Trust section D. Termination and the remaining assets when this is the final account. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/15/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Court to determine whether pro per Petitioner will be able to administer this estate without representation. Petitioner is a pro per nonresident of CA requesting $20,000.00 minimum bond.
